profile.title: Profile - Parahub

progress.title: Profile Completion
progress.incomplete: Complete your profile for full access
progress.congrats: Congratulations! You have gained full access to all features.

profile.para_id_hint: Printable identity card with your name, avatar and QR code

credentials.title: Login Credentials
credentials.hna_hint: Use this to login instead of your email
credentials.password_unavailable: Password is not available for display
credentials.cooldown_info: Username can be changed once every 30 days

security.title: Security & Trust
security.pgp_description: Generate and manage your cryptographic keys
security.pgp_help: Used to cryptographically sign critical operations (deals, verifications). Your private key is stored only in your browser and never leaves your device.
security.pgp_setup_text: Generate your PGP keys to sign critical operations on Parahub. Your private key never leaves your device and will be stored in your browser's localStorage. Make sure to backup your keys securely — if you lose them, you won't be able to sign transactions.
security.backup_warning_text: Your seed phrase restores both your Lightning wallet and PGP keys. Never share it. Store it securely offline.
security.private_key_exported: Private key exported! Keep it safe.
security.public_key_not_available: Public key not available in history
security.warning_full_control: Your private key allows full control over your cryptographic identity
security.warning_never_share: NEVER share this key with anyone or any service
security.warning_secure_storage: Store in a secure location (password manager, encrypted storage)
security.warning_impersonation: Anyone with this key can impersonate you and sign deals on your behalf
security.export_confirm_text: Are you sure you want to export your private key? Make absolutely certain you will store it securely.
security.test_description: Test PGP signatures and HTTP request signing
security.wot_description: Verify identities and manage your trust network

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.display_name_hint: This name will be shown on your profile and Para-ID badge
preferences.language_hint: Choose your preferred language for the interface. This will be used across all your devices.
preferences.country_hint: Auto-detected from your IP on first login. Affects which local listings you see.
preferences.animation_hint: Enable smooth animations throughout the interface (transitions, map navigation, etc). When disabled, all transitions will be instant.
preferences.map_presence_hint: Show your avatar on the map and see other users in real-time (MMORPG-style presence)
preferences.opensky_mode_hint: Show OpenSky controls on the map (mission area, dashboard link). Aerial imagery layer is always available.
preferences.map_style_hint: Choose your preferred map visualization style
preferences.chat_client_hint: Choose your preferred Matrix chat client. Element (desktop, all features), FluffyChat (mobile UI, no VoIP), Cinny (lightweight, VoIP works)
preferences.push_notifications_description: Get notifications about new contracts, debts, and important events
preferences.push_permission_hint: Notifications are blocked. Allow them in your browser settings.
preferences.notifications_hint: Control which push notifications you receive
preferences.notify_sos_managed: SOS alerts are managed per group
preferences.dev_mode_hint: Switch between development and production servers. Page will reload.

profile.association_join_intro: You are joining a Portuguese non-profit association that develops the open decentralized Parahub infrastructure.
profile.association_membership_benefits: Membership is free and gives you the right to participate in the governance of the association, receive information about activities, and make proposals.
profile.estatutos_purpose: Development, support, promotion of open-source protocols and software for a global, decentralized and federated information infrastructure.
profile.estatutos_read_full: Read the full text of the statutes →
profile.estatutos_translation_notice: This is a translation. The legally binding original in Portuguese is available

personality.title: Personality Profile
personality.full_description: Voluntary psycho-informatics questionnaire for better matching and understanding within the community.

profile.leave_organization_confirm: Are you sure you want to leave "{name}"?
profile.leave_organization_error: Failed to leave organization. Please try again.
profile.terms_accept_required: You must accept the association statutes to join
profile.terms_acceptance_text: I have read and agree to the association statutes and commit to uphold its provisions, contribute to the goals of the association, and refrain from actions that harm the reputation or assets of the association.
profile.join_association_success: Congratulations! You are now a member of PARAHUB - ASSOCIAÇÃO 🎉
profile.join_association_error: Failed to join association. Please try again.
profile.not_member_of_organizations: You are not a member of any organizations yet

lightning.title: Lightning Wallet
lightning.help_text: Configure your Lightning address to receive payments from the Para-ads advertising system.

recommendations.title: Profile Completion
recommendations.subtitle: Complete your profile for full access
recommendations.hint: A complete profile increases trust in the community

actions.generate_pgp_keys_desc: Required for signing deals and verifications
actions.join_association_desc: Get access to the community and additional features
actions.add_psychhash_desc: Visible to community for personality matching
actions.configure_lightning_desc: Required to receive payments from the advertising system

data_privacy.title: Data & Privacy
data_privacy.info_description: Download all your contracts, debts, and verifications with cryptographic proofs for court evidence.
data_privacy.export_hint: Includes all contracts, debts, verifications, PGP signatures, and OpenTimestamps proofs. Use this as legal evidence if parahub.io becomes unavailable.
data_privacy.gdpr_description: Under GDPR Article 20 and Portuguese data protection law, you have the right to receive your personal data in a structured, commonly used format. This export provides all your data for portability and legal purposes.
data_privacy.delete_account_warning: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. All your profiles, contracts, debts, and verifications will be permanently removed.
data_privacy.delete_confirm_message: This action cannot be undone. All your data including profiles, contracts, debts, and verifications will be permanently deleted.

photos.title: Profile Photos
photos.avatar_hint: Your avatar is shown in chats, marketplace, and profile. It will be cropped to a square.
photos.id_photo_hint: Formal photo like a passport photo. This appears on your printed Para-ID badge for offline verification.
photos.error_file_too_large: File is too large. Maximum size is 10MB.
photos.id_tips_title: Tips for a good ID photo:

verification_photo.title: WoT Verification Photo
verification_photo.hint: Private photo used for face deduplication. Never shown publicly — only to verifiers during WoT verification.
verification_photo.consent_label: I consent to processing my biometric data (face embedding) for Sybil defense under GDPR Art. 9(2)(a)
verification_photo.consent_required: Biometric consent is required to upload a verification photo
verification_photo.duplicate_error: This face matches an already-verified profile
verification_photo.no_face: No face detected. Please upload a clear photo.
verification_photo.multiple_faces: Multiple faces detected. Upload a photo with only your face.
verification_photo.delete_warning: Deleting your verification photo will affect your WoT status

profiles.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete profile "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
profiles.requiresVerification: Get verified by 3 community members to create additional profiles
profiles.localNameHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only
profiles.createSuccessMessage: Your {type} profile has been created and activated.

user_profile.title: User Profile
user_profile.not_found_desc_404: This profile does not exist or is not publicly available.
user_profile.not_found_desc_error: Failed to load profile. Please try again later.
user_profile.antispam_fee_desc: This user requires an anti-spam fee to be contacted:
user_profile.pgp_desc: Used for verifying signed messages and critical operations
user_profile.reputation_coming_soon: Detailed reputation breakdown coming soon. This will show transaction history, verification weight, and community feedback.
user_profile.reputation_score_not_yet: Reputation score appears after activity in 2+ areas
user_profile.lightning_coming_soon: Lightning Network payments coming soon. This will enable instant, low-fee Bitcoin transfers.
user_profile.invoice_coming_soon: Lightning invoices coming soon. Request payments from other users.
user_profile.map_coming_soon: Map view coming soon. See user's location and nearby items (if location is public).
user_profile.note_placeholder: Add private notes, tags, or reminders about this user...
user_profile.note_private_desc: This note is private and only visible to you.
user_profile.note_save_error: Failed to save note. Please try again.
user_profile.report_coming_soon: User reporting system coming soon. This will allow you to flag suspicious or fraudulent activity.
user_profile.antispam_tooltip: Fee required from strangers to message this user (protects against spam)
user_profile.pgp_tooltip: Cryptographic key used to verify signed messages
user_profile.ln_address_tooltip: Lightning address for receiving instant Bitcoin payments
user_profile.message_user_error_missing_info: Unable to contact user: missing account information
user_profile.call_user_error: Unable to start call: missing user information
user_profile.pgp_history_load_failed: Failed to load PGP key history
user_profile.verify_description: Web of Trust verification allows you to vouch for this user's identity after meeting them in person or through trusted channels.
user_profile.verify_coming_soon: WoT verification system coming soon. This will enable you to cryptographically sign identity verifications.
user_profile.ln_no_address: {name} has not configured a Lightning address
user_profile.ln_no_wallet: You need to set up your Lightning wallet first
user_profile.inv_choose_method: Choose how you want to receive payment
user_profile.inv_bolt11_desc: One-time invoice for a specific amount
user_profile.inv_bolt11_hint: Share this invoice with the sender to receive payment
user_profile.inv_spark_hint: Share this address — it can be used multiple times
